cards.name: Naruto Uzumaki
cards.subtitle: Academy Student

attacks.name: Punch
attacks.description: A straightforward punch.

attacks.name: Headbutt
attacks.description: Naruto charges in headfirst.

cards.flavorText: I'm gonna be Hokage! Believe it!

cards.name: Naruto Uzumaki
cards.subtitle: Genin of the Leaf

attacks.name: Shadow Clone Strike
attacks.description: Naruto attacks with his shadow clones.

attacks.name: Rasengan
attacks.description: A spiraling sphere of compressed chakra slams into the target.

cards.flavorText: I never go back on my word. That's my nindo!

cards.name: Naruto Uzumaki
cards.subtitle: Sage Mode

attacks.name: Sage Art: Rasengan
attacks.description: A Rasengan infused with natural energy.

attacks.name: Rasenshuriken
attacks.description: A devastating wind attack that damages Naruto's own body.

ability.name: Sage Sensing
ability.description: Once per turn, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

cards.flavorText: The power of nature flows through me.

cards.name: Sasuke Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Academy Student

attacks.name: Shuriken Throw
attacks.description: A precisely thrown shuriken.

attacks.name: Fire Style: Fireball
attacks.description: Sasuke unleashes a fireball learned from the Uchiha clan.

cards.flavorText: I am an avenger.

cards.name: Sasuke Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Genin of the Leaf

attacks.name: Lion's Barrage
attacks.description: A fierce taijutsu combo learned by copying Rock Lee.

attacks.name: Chidori
attacks.description: Lightning chakra concentrated in the hand. May paralyze the target.

cards.flavorText: I have to obtain power, no matter what.

cards.name: Sasuke Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Mangekyo Awakened

attacks.name: Chidori Sharp Spear
attacks.description: An extended blade of lightning chakra pierces through defenses.

attacks.name: Amaterasu
attacks.description: Black flames that cannot be extinguished engulf the target.

ability.name: Sharingan Insight
ability.description: Once per turn, if this Ninja is your Active Ninja, you may look at your opponent's hand.

cards.flavorText: These eyes see the truth of all creation.

cards.name: Sakura Haruno
cards.subtitle: Academy Student

attacks.name: Textbook Strike
attacks.description: Sakura strikes with precision learned from her studies.

attacks.name: Chakra Control
attacks.description: Sakura's excellent chakra control lets her heal minor wounds.

cards.flavorText: I'm not going to be a burden anymore!

cards.name: Sakura Haruno
cards.subtitle: Medical Ninja

attacks.name: Chakra Scalpel
attacks.description: A precise strike using medical chakra to cut internally.

attacks.name: Healing Palm
attacks.description: Sakura channels healing chakra to restore vitality.

cards.flavorText: Tsunade-sama taught me everything I know.

cards.name: Sakura Haruno
cards.subtitle: Byakugou Unleashed

attacks.name: Cherry Blossom Impact
attacks.description: A monstrous punch that shatters the earth.

attacks.name: Mitotic Regeneration
attacks.description: The Byakugou seal releases stored chakra to heal all wounds.

ability.name: Creation Rebirth
ability.description: Once per turn, heal 10 damage from this Ninja.

cards.flavorText: I've finally caught up to them.

cards.name: Kakashi Hatake
cards.subtitle: Young Prodigy

attacks.name: Kunai Slash
attacks.description: A swift strike with a kunai blade.

attacks.name: White Light Blade
attacks.description: Kakashi's father's signature technique, inherited by the son.

cards.flavorText: Those who break the rules are trash, but those who abandon their comrades are worse.

cards.name: Kakashi Hatake
cards.subtitle: Jonin Captain

attacks.name: Lightning Blade
attacks.description: An upgraded Chidori, Kakashi's signature assassination technique.

attacks.name: Copy Jutsu
attacks.description: Kakashi copies his opponent's technique. Draw a card.

cards.flavorText: I am Kakashi Hatake. I have no desire to tell you my likes and dislikes.

cards.name: Kakashi Hatake
cards.subtitle: Sharingan Master

attacks.name: Lightning Blade Barrage
attacks.description: A rapid series of lightning-charged strikes.

attacks.name: Kamui
attacks.description: Warps the target into another dimension. Drains Kakashi's stamina.

ability.name: Copy Ninja
ability.description: Once per turn, you may use any Jutsu Scroll card in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Shuffle it back into your deck afterward.

cards.flavorText: The man who has copied over 1,000 jutsu.

cards.name: Rock Lee
cards.subtitle: Taijutsu Specialist

attacks.name: Leaf Whirlwind
attacks.description: A spinning kick that sweeps the opponent off their feet.

attacks.name: Dynamic Entry
attacks.description: Lee leaps in with a powerful flying kick.

cards.flavorText: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard!

cards.name: Rock Lee
cards.subtitle: Eight Gates Released

attacks.name: Primary Lotus
attacks.description: A devastating piledriver that strains Lee's body.

attacks.name: Hidden Lotus
attacks.description: The ultimate forbidden taijutsu. Extreme damage to both target and user.

ability.name: Gates of Power
ability.description: This Ninja's attacks do 10 more damage for each damage counter on it.

cards.flavorText: The Fifth Gate... Gate of Closing, open!

cards.name: Neji Hyuga
cards.subtitle: Branch House Genius

attacks.name: Gentle Fist
attacks.description: Strikes the chakra points, potentially sealing the opponent's abilities.

attacks.name: Eight Trigrams: 64 Palms
attacks.description: A rapid barrage of 64 precise strikes to the chakra network.

ability.name: Byakugan
ability.description: This Ninja cannot be affected by Genjutsu cards.

cards.flavorText: You are within the range of my divination.

cards.name: Tenten
cards.subtitle: Weapon Specialist

attacks.name: Weapon Barrage
attacks.description: A rain of various thrown weapons.

attacks.name: Twin Rising Dragons
attacks.description: Tenten unseals weapons from her scrolls, hitting all enemies.

cards.flavorText: I'll show you my full arsenal!

cards.name: Shikamaru Nara
cards.subtitle: Lazy Genius

attacks.name: Shadow Possession
attacks.description: Shikamaru's shadow binds the opponent in place.

attacks.name: Shadow Strangle
attacks.description: The shadow tightens around the target.

cards.flavorText: What a drag...

cards.name: Shikamaru Nara
cards.subtitle: Jonin Strategist

attacks.name: Shadow Stitching
attacks.description: Multiple shadow tendrils pierce and bind the opponent.

attacks.name: Strategic Trap
attacks.description: Shikamaru executes a multi-step plan. Draw 2 cards.

ability.name: Tactical Mind
ability.description: Once per turn, you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

cards.flavorText: I've already thought 200 moves ahead.

cards.name: Ino Yamanaka
cards.subtitle: Mind Walker

attacks.name: Mind Transfer Jutsu
attacks.description: Ino projects her consciousness into the target, confusing them.

attacks.name: Flower Bomb
attacks.description: A deceptive attack disguised with flower petals.

cards.flavorText: I'll get inside your head!

cards.name: Choji Akimichi
cards.subtitle: Expansion Fighter

attacks.name: Partial Expansion
attacks.description: Choji expands his fist to enormous size.

attacks.name: Human Boulder
attacks.description: Choji rolls into the opponent at full speed.

cards.flavorText: Never call me fat!

cards.name: Hinata Hyuga
cards.subtitle: Gentle Warrior

attacks.name: Gentle Step
attacks.description: A delicate but precise chakra-infused palm strike.

attacks.name: Protection of the Eight Trigrams
attacks.description: Hinata creates a protective barrier of chakra threads.

ability.name: Byakugan
ability.description: This Ninja cannot be affected by confusion.

cards.flavorText: I will never give up... because that is my ninja way too!

cards.name: Kiba Inuzuka
cards.subtitle: Fang Warrior

attacks.name: Beast Slash
attacks.description: Kiba and Akamaru strike together.

attacks.name: Fang Over Fang
attacks.description: Kiba and Akamaru spin in a devastating dual drilling attack.

cards.flavorText: Let's go, Akamaru!

cards.name: Shino Aburame
cards.subtitle: Insect User

attacks.name: Parasitic Insects
attacks.description: Shino's insects latch onto the target and drain their chakra.

attacks.name: Insect Swarm
attacks.description: A massive cloud of destruction bugs engulfs the opponent.

cards.flavorText: Why? Because I am a member of the Aburame clan.

cards.name: Minato Namikaze
cards.subtitle: Leaf's Yellow Flash

attacks.name: Kunai Strike
attacks.description: A swift kunai strike from the Fourth Hokage.

attacks.name: Flying Thunder God
attacks.description: Minato teleports instantly, allowing you to switch your Active Ninja.

cards.flavorText: Flee on sight... the Yellow Flash of the Leaf.

cards.name: Minato Namikaze
cards.subtitle: Fourth Hokage

attacks.name: Space-Time Rasengan
attacks.description: Minato teleports behind the target and delivers a Rasengan.

attacks.name: Reaper Death Seal
attacks.description: The ultimate sealing technique that damages both user and target.

ability.name: Teleportation Jutsu
ability.description: This Ninja's retreat cost is 0.

cards.flavorText: I will protect the village and the ones I love!

cards.name: Hashirama Senju
cards.subtitle: First Hokage

attacks.name: Wood Style: Great Forest
attacks.description: Wooden branches sprout and entangle the opponent.

attacks.name: Wood Style: Deep Forest Bloom
attacks.description: A massive forest erupts from the ground, engulfing everything.

ability.name: Will of Fire
ability.description: Once per turn, heal 10 damage from each of your Benched Ninja.

cards.flavorText: The true strength of a ninja lies in protecting those who matter most.

cards.name: Tobirama Senju
cards.subtitle: Second Hokage

attacks.name: Water Style: Water Bullet
attacks.description: A high-pressure water blast.

attacks.name: Water Style: Water Dragon
attacks.description: A massive dragon formed from water crashes into the target.

ability.name: Water Mastery
ability.description: This Ninja's Water-type attacks do 10 more damage.

cards.flavorText: I invented jutsu that shaped the world.

cards.name: Hiruzen Sarutobi
cards.subtitle: Third Hokage

attacks.name: Fire Style: Dragon Flame
attacks.description: A powerful stream of fire from the Professor.

attacks.name: Shuriken Shadow Clone
attacks.description: A single shuriken multiplies into thousands.

ability.name: The Professor
ability.description: This Ninja may use any chakra type to pay for attack costs.

cards.flavorText: The God of Shinobi, master of all jutsu.

cards.name: Gaara
cards.subtitle: Sand Jinchuriki

attacks.name: Sand Bullet
attacks.description: Compressed sand fires at the opponent like a bullet.

attacks.name: Sand Coffin
attacks.description: Sand wraps around the opponent, immobilizing them.

ability.name: Sand Shield
ability.description: Reduce all damage done to this Ninja by 10.

cards.flavorText: I fight only for myself and love only myself.

cards.name: Gaara
cards.subtitle: Fifth Kazekage

attacks.name: Sand Tsunami
attacks.description: A massive wave of sand engulfs the battlefield.

attacks.name: Sand Burial
attacks.description: The sand crushes the opponent completely.

ability.name: Absolute Defense
ability.description: Reduce all damage done to this Ninja by 20.

cards.flavorText: I will protect this village and everyone in it.

cards.name: Orochimaru
cards.subtitle: Legendary Sannin

attacks.name: Striking Shadow Snakes
attacks.description: Snakes lunge from Orochimaru's sleeves, delivering venom.

attacks.name: Kusanagi Blade
attacks.description: The legendary grass-cutting sword strikes the opponent.

ability.name: Immortality Jutsu
ability.description: The first time this Ninja would be knocked out, flip a coin. If heads, it survives with 10 HP instead.

cards.flavorText: I want to obtain all the jutsu in the world.

cards.name: Kabuto Yakushi
cards.subtitle: Spy Medic

attacks.name: Chakra Scalpel
attacks.description: An invisible blade of chakra cuts tendons and muscles.

attacks.name: Cell Regeneration
attacks.description: Kabuto rapidly heals his own wounds with medical ninjutsu.

cards.flavorText: I'm just a humble medic.

cards.name: Zabuza Momochi
cards.subtitle: Demon of the Mist

attacks.name: Silent Killing
attacks.description: Zabuza strikes unseen from within the mist.

attacks.name: Executioner's Cleave
attacks.description: A devastating swing of the Executioner's Blade.

ability.name: Hidden Mist
ability.description: When this Ninja is your Active Ninja, your opponent's attacks have a 20% chance to miss.

cards.flavorText: In the mist, you cannot see me. But I can see you.

cards.name: Haku
cards.subtitle: Ice Mirror User

attacks.name: Senbon Needles
attacks.description: Precisely thrown needles target vital pressure points.

attacks.name: Demonic Ice Mirrors
attacks.description: Ice mirrors form a dome, and Haku attacks from every angle.

cards.flavorText: I will protect the one who is precious to me.

cards.name: Kimimaro
cards.subtitle: Last of the Kaguya

attacks.name: Bone Bullet
attacks.description: Kimimaro fires a bone projectile from his fingertip.

attacks.name: Dance of the Camellia
attacks.description: A graceful and deadly bone-sword dance.

ability.name: Bone Armor
ability.description: Reduce all damage done to this Ninja by 10.

cards.flavorText: My bones are my blade and my shield.

cards.name: Iruka Umino
cards.subtitle: Academy Instructor

attacks.name: Encouraging Words
attacks.description: Iruka's encouragement inspires his allies. Draw a card.

attacks.name: Barrier Jutsu
attacks.description: Iruka creates a protective barrier around himself.

cards.flavorText: Naruto... you are not the demon fox. You are Naruto Uzumaki.

cards.name: Konohamaru Sarutobi
cards.subtitle: Honorable Grandson

attacks.name: Sexy Jutsu
attacks.description: A ridiculous transformation that may confuse the opponent.

attacks.name: Fire Style: Ember
attacks.description: A small but spirited fireball.

cards.flavorText: One day I'll be Hokage, just like my grandpa!

cards.name: Jiraiya
cards.subtitle: Toad Sage

attacks.name: Toad Oil Bullet
attacks.description: A blast of flammable toad oil.

attacks.name: Rasengan
attacks.description: The spiraling sphere technique, passed down to Naruto.

ability.name: Sage Research
ability.description: Once per turn, you may draw an extra card at the end of your turn.

cards.flavorText: The Gallant Jiraiya, one of the Legendary Sannin!

cards.name: Tsunade
cards.subtitle: Legendary Healer

attacks.name: Heaven Kick of Pain
attacks.description: A single finger flick with monstrous strength.

attacks.name: Mega Healing Palm
attacks.description: The greatest healing technique, restoring massive amounts of HP.

ability.name: Legendary Medic
ability.description: Once per turn, you may heal 20 damage from one of your Benched Ninja.

cards.flavorText: I am the Fifth Hokage, Tsunade!

cards.name: Might Guy
cards.subtitle: Noble Beast of the Leaf

attacks.name: Dynamic Entry
attacks.description: Guy launches himself at the opponent with a flying kick.

attacks.name: Morning Peacock
attacks.description: Punches so fast they ignite the air. The strain hurts Guy too.

ability.name: Power of Youth
ability.description: This Ninja's attacks do 10 more damage if it has any damage counters on it.

cards.flavorText: The springtime of youth burns brightly!

cards.name: Substitution Jutsu
cards.description: Switch your Active Ninja with one of your Benched Ninja.

cards.name: Shadow Clone Jutsu
cards.description: Search your deck for a Ninja card with the same name as your Active Ninja and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Transformation Jutsu
cards.description: Your Active Ninja copies the attacks of the Defending Ninja until the end of your next turn.

cards.name: Chakra Focus
cards.description: Attach an extra Chakra card from your hand to one of your Ninja this turn.

cards.name: Intelligence Gathering
cards.description: Look at your opponent's hand.

cards.name: Medical Ninjutsu
cards.description: Heal 30 damage from one of your Ninja.

cards.name: Paper Bomb
cards.description: Deal 30 damage to your opponent's Active Ninja.

cards.name: Hidden Mist Jutsu
cards.description: Your opponent's Active Ninja's attacks do 20 less damage during their next turn.

cards.name: Earth Wall
cards.description: Prevent all damage done to your Active Ninja during your opponent's next turn.

cards.name: Fire Style: Fireball
cards.description: Deal 40 damage to your opponent's Active Ninja. If your Active Ninja is Fire type, deal 50 instead.

cards.name: Water Style: Water Dragon
cards.description: Deal 40 damage to your opponent's Active Ninja. If your Active Ninja is Water type, deal 50 instead.

cards.name: Wind Style: Air Bullets
cards.description: Deal 30 damage to your opponent's Active Ninja and 10 damage to one Benched Ninja.

cards.name: Lightning Style: Thunderbolt
cards.description: Deal 40 damage to your opponent's Active Ninja. If your Active Ninja is Lightning type, the Defending Ninja is now paralyzed.

cards.name: Summoning Jutsu
cards.description: Search your deck for any Stage 0 Ninja card and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Ninja Art: Poison Fog
cards.description: Your opponent's Active Ninja is now poisoned.

cards.name: Sand Armor
cards.description: Prevent the next 30 damage done to your Active Ninja.

cards.name: Eight Trigrams Seal
cards.description: Your opponent's Active Ninja cannot use abilities during their next turn.

cards.name: Chakra Disruption
cards.description: Discard 1 Chakra card attached to your opponent's Active Ninja.

cards.name: Team Formation
cards.description: Draw 3 cards. Then discard 1 card from your hand.

cards.name: Emergency Heal
cards.description: Heal 50 damage from your Active Ninja. You cannot attack this turn.

cards.name: Genjutsu: Mirror
cards.description: Your opponent's Active Ninja is now confused.

cards.name: Smoke Bomb
cards.description: Switch your Active Ninja with one of your Benched Ninja. The new Active Ninja cannot be damaged during your opponent's next turn.

cards.name: Training Ground
cards.description: Search your deck for up to 2 Chakra cards and attach them to one of your Ninja. Shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Will of Fire
cards.description: Draw 2 cards. If any of your Ninja were knocked out during your opponent's last turn, draw 4 cards instead.

cards.name: Curse Mark Cleansing
cards.description: Remove all status conditions from one of your Ninja. Heal 20 damage from that Ninja.

cards.name: Kunai
cards.description: Attached Ninja's attacks do 10 more damage.

cards.name: Shuriken Set
cards.description: Once per turn, you may deal 20 damage to one of your opponent's Benched Ninja.

cards.name: Explosive Tag
cards.description: When attached Ninja is knocked out, deal 40 damage to the opponent's Active Ninja.

cards.name: Ninja Wire
cards.description: If the attached Ninja is damaged by an attack, the attacker is now paralyzed.

cards.name: Military Rations Pill
cards.description: Once per turn, heal 10 damage from the attached Ninja.

cards.name: Scroll of Sealing
cards.description: Attached Ninja cannot be affected by status conditions.

cards.name: Paper Bomb Tag
cards.description: Attached Ninja's attacks have a 20% chance to burn the target.

cards.name: Chakra Blade
cards.description: Attached Ninja's attacks do 20 more damage. Attached Ninja takes 10 more damage from attacks.

cards.name: Weighted Training Gear
cards.description: Attached Ninja's retreat cost is increased by 2. Attached Ninja's attacks do 20 more damage.

cards.name: Headband of Resolve
cards.description: If attached Ninja has 30 HP or less remaining, its attacks do 30 more damage.

cards.name: Iruka Umino
cards.subtitle: Academy Instructor
cards.description: Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Kakashi Hatake
cards.subtitle: Copy Ninja Sensei
cards.description: Search your deck for any 1 card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Might Guy
cards.subtitle: Taijutsu Master
cards.description: Your Active Ninja's attacks do 30 more damage this turn. That Ninja takes 10 damage at the end of your turn.

cards.name: Kurenai Yuhi
cards.subtitle: Genjutsu Mistress
cards.description: Your opponent's Active Ninja is now confused. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Asuma Sarutobi
cards.subtitle: Guardian Ninja
cards.description: Attach 1 Earth Chakra card from your discard pile to one of your Benched Ninja. Draw 1 card.
